thewikipedialibrary-desc: U dir ogeysiis isticmaalayaasha u qalmitaankooda Maktabadda Wikipedia marka ay dhaafaan tirada wax ka beddelka iyo xadka da’da xisaabta.
notification-header-twl-eligiblity: Hambalyo! Hadda waxaad u qalantaa Maktabadda Wikipedia.
notification-body-twl-eligiblity: Halkan guji si aad u daalacato ururin ballaaran oo ilo bilaash ah oo lagu kalsoonaan karo.
